content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Emberforge Raider", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Strike fast, strike twice, strike before they know what hit them."", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Aggressive 2-mana creature with haste and menace. Stats are 2/1 which follows the CMC+1 guideline for commons with upside. Haste enables immediate pressure, menace makes it hard to block profitably. Classic red aggressive design."}, {"name": "Skyrender, the Inferno Lord", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, haste
Whenever ~ attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.
{2}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "When the sky burns, even the mountains bow in reverence.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Mythic dragon with multiple abilities showcasing red's aggressive nature. Flying and haste provide immediate board impact. Attack trigger gives reach and board control. Activated ability allows for explosive turns. 5/4 body is substantial but not oppressive for 6 mana. Splashy mythic design that feels powerful and unique."}, {"name": "Verdant Exploration", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path through the wilderness leads to new discoveries.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple land search spell at 2 mana. Goes to hand rather than battlefield to avoid being too powerful at common. Classic green ramp effect with proper 'search your library' templating including reveal and shuffle. Enables multicolor strategies and fixes mana."}, {"name": "Ironbark Trampler", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps leave craters where flowers once bloomed.", "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Large green creature testing the P/T ceiling for commons. 6/4 for 5 mana gives 10 total stats, which is CMC+5, acceptable for common with single keyword. Trample is perfect for large green creatures, allowing damage to push through. Classic green design philosophy of big creatures."}, {"name": "Harmony of Growth", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Whenever a creature enters the battlefield under your control, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control four or more creatures, draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability enchantment that rewards going wide with creatures. First ability provides optional creature enhancement fitting green's +1/+1 counter theme. Second ability gives card draw (unusual for green) but gated behind controlling many creatures, which green excels at. Both abilities synergize with creature strategies. Appropriate complexity for uncommon."}]}
